title: DCMS-sponsored museums and galleries annual performance indicators 2023/24
body: "About  The Department for Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS) sponsors 15 national museums which provide free entry to their permanent collections. This release presents the annual performance indicator data collected by DCMS-sponsored museums and galleries for the financial year 2023/24.  First Published  17 July 2025  Period covered  April 2023 to March 2024  Geographic coverage  England  Pre-release access  The pre-release access document contains a list of ministers and officials who have received privileged early access to this release of Sponsored Museums: Performance Indicators. In line with best practice, the list has been kept to a minimum and those given access for briefing purposes had a maximum of 24 hours.  Office for Statistics Regulation  Our statistical practice is regulated by the OSR. OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to.  You are welcome to contact us directly with any comments about how we meet these standards by emailing evidence@dcms.gov.uk. Alternatively, you can contact OSR by emailing regulation@statistics.gov.uk or via the OSR website.  Next update  Early 2026  Contact  Responsible statistician: Thomas Evans  For any queries please contact evidence@dcms.gov.uk. "
